scripts.build: pnpm run build:core && pnpm run generate:coach-registry && expo export --platform ios --output-dir dist
scripts.eas:build:android:preview: pnpm run build:core && pnpm run generate:coach-registry && pnpm dlx eas-cli build --platform android --profile preview
scripts.eas:build:android:production: pnpm run build:core && pnpm run generate:coach-registry && pnpm dlx eas-cli build --platform android --profile production
scripts.eas:build:ios:simulator: pnpm run build:core && pnpm run generate:coach-registry && pnpm dlx eas-cli build --platform ios --profile ios-simulator
scripts.eas:build:ios:production: pnpm run build:core && pnpm run generate:coach-registry && pnpm dlx eas-cli build --platform ios --profile production
scripts.eas:submit:android: pnpm dlx eas-cli submit --platform android --profile production
scripts.eas:submit:ios: pnpm dlx eas-cli submit --platform ios --profile production
